name: Workspace Setup — Active Workspace Config and UI Selector
objective: Allow the active workspace to be set via environment variable and optionally selected in the UI, so RelayHQ can operate across multiple workspaces without hardcoding ws-demo everywhere.
exit_criteria: RELAYHQ_WORKSPACE_ID env var filters the read model to the specified workspace.
When RELAYHQ_WORKSPACE_ID is unset the server returns all workspaces (existing behaviour).
A GET /api/settings endpoint returns the active workspace id and available workspace ids.
The nav/header shows the active workspace name and, if multiple workspaces exist, a selector.
All existing tests continue to pass; new behaviour is covered by tests.
